sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38058" key="e)pana/zeucis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπανά-ζευξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n38058.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">return,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4018.tlg001:399:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ascl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">399.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
